_meta.note: Master tag list for equipment, Relics, Creatures, and other tagged items in this app. Use appliesTo so editors only offer relevant tags; empty appliesTo means the tag appears everywhere.
_meta.tagTypeNote: `tagType` is a coarse gear/kind label for the Tags library list (weapon, armor, tool, etc.) — orthogonal to `category` (combat, protection, …) used for tone and grouping.
_meta.pointCostNote: `pointCost` is the Storypath tag dot cost from Origin (Revised) weapon and armor lists (pp. 123–126) and Hero follower tags (p. 204). Negative values are flaw credits. `null` means the table does not assign a dot price on that line. Confirm costs at the PDF before autopricing in play.
sourceDocuments: Scion_Origin_(Revised_Download).pdf — weapon and armor tags pp. 123–126

sharp.name: Sharp
sharp.description: Edged or piercing — can cut, impale, or threaten lethal harm.
sharp.source: Storypath tags / Pandora’s Box Relic & weapon examples (paraphrase)

heavy.name: Heavy
heavy.description: Hard hits, high mass, or slow recovery — often pairs with Might.

ranged.name: Ranged
ranged.description: Medium band; +1 Difficulty firing at Close; Firearms or Athletics +1 Enhancement.

armored.name: Armored
armored.description: Resists harm — generic armor hook when you are not splitting Soft vs Hard.

softArmor.name: Soft armor
softArmor.description: Flexible protection: +1 Difficulty to the Inflict Damage stunt against the wearer; confirm stacking with SG.
softArmor.pointCostNote: Soft armor raises Difficulty to Inflict Damage; Hard and Soft do not stack on the same armor but may from different sources (Origin p. 126).

hardArmor.name: Hard armor
hardArmor.description: Rigid protection — plate, ballistic inserts, monster chitin, riot shields braced as cover. Storypath-style Hard tag.
hardArmor.pointCostNote: Hard armor adds Injury Condition boxes per Origin (Revised) p. 126: cheaper tier one box, higher tier an additional box; boxes stay filled until scene end; not combined with Soft on the same armor.

ballisticArmor.name: Ballistic armor
ballisticArmor.description: Rated against firearms and shrapnel; often Hard, may still be Concealed under clothing at lower Scale.
ballisticArmor.source: Modern tactical gear + Storypath armor fiction (paraphrase)

shield.name: Shield
shield.description: Parry surface or mobile cover — buckler to tower shield; may also justify melee stunts depending on fiction.

concealed.name: Concealed
concealed.description: Easy to hide on the person or in plain sight.

loud.name: Loud
loud.description: Hard to use quietly; may attract attention or Complications.

faithbound.name: Faithbound
faithbound.description: Oaths, worship, or divine patronage shape its power or taboos.

sentient.name: Sentient
sentient.description: Has drives, voice, or agenda — may grant Momentum hooks.

swift.name: Swift
swift.description: Fast movement, quick draw, or initiative edge in fiction.

keenSenses.name: Keen senses
keenSenses.description: Tracking, hearing, scent, or unusual perception.

loyal.name: Loyal
loyal.description: Sticks with you unless dramatically betrayed or coerced.

versatile.name: Versatile
versatile.description: Useful in several kinds of challenges without narrow specialty.

legendary.name: Legendary
legendary.description: Stories precede it; may draw Fatebinding or attention at Scale.

melee.name: Melee
melee.description: Close range only; Close Combat +1 Enhancement.

reach.name: Reach
reach.description: Close Combat attacks reach out to short range (long haft, whip, etc.).

lethal.name: Lethal
lethal.description: Lethal track (Scratched, Cut, Bleeding Out); not Bruised/Battered from this tag.

bashing.name: Bashing
bashing.description: Blunt harm; Broken/Battered-style outcomes; not for severing.

aggravated.name: Aggravated
aggravated.description: Supernatural grievous harm; Aggravated Conditions need magic to heal.

arcing.name: Arcing
arcing.description: Arcing shots: downgrade target cover one step when firing around it.

automatic.name: Automatic
automatic.description: Burst fire: +1 Enhancement to Critical Hit stunt; incompatible with Melee and Shockwave; complications after Empty the Clip per book.

firearm.name: Firearm
firearm.description: Gun: use Firearms; +1 Enhancement to Firearms.

grappling.name: Grappling
grappling.description: +1 Enhancement to Grapple attacks with this weapon.

longRange.name: Long range
longRange.description: Effective range band extends to long.

messy.name: Messy
messy.description: Ragged wounds or splattered cover; leaves an obvious trail.

natural.name: Natural
natural.description: Body weapon (fangs, claws); cannot be disarmed; injuries may still impose penalties.

piercing.name: Piercing
piercing.description: When dealing damage, reduce target hard armor by 1 or soft armor by 2.

pushing.name: Pushing
pushing.description: After Stress or Injury, may also knock the target prone.

returning.name: Returning
returning.description: Thrown or fired weapon returns to the wielder (boomerang, tethered harpoon, etc.).

shockwave.name: Shockwave
shockwave.description: Can strike all targets in the same range band; large Scale or magic—rare on mundane weapons.

slow.name: Slow
slow.description: Setup, reload, or repositioning: dedicate an action to the slow aspect.

stun.name: Stun
stun.description: Injury outcomes limited to listed bruising/stagger/stun/battered; Taken Out means unconscious.

thrown.name: Thrown
thrown.description: Thrown to medium range; use Athletics or Firearms per build; harder to use at Close (see book).

unconcealable.name: Unconcealable
unconcealable.description: Too bulky to hide without serious smuggling effort.

weaponVersatile.name: Versatile (weapon)
weaponVersatile.description: +1 Enhancement when using this weapon for Stunts (table weapon tag, not generic gear versatility).

concealableWeapon.name: Concealable (weapon)
concealableWeapon.description: +1 Enhancement to sneak this weapon into a place unseen.

weaponLoud.name: Loud (weapon)
weaponLoud.description: Cannot be silenced; firing where people can hear draws attention.

cumbersome.name: Cumbersome
cumbersome.description: +1 Difficulty to athletic feats while worn.

innocuous.name: Innocuous
innocuous.description: Looks like ordinary clothes or sports pads; common on Relic armor.

resistant.name: Resistant
resistant.description: Tuned vs a damage type (e.g. bulletproof vs Firearms+Piercing); may be taken more than once if points allow.

weighty.name: Weighty
weighty.description: Long labor or sleeping in it risks Fatigued (Athletics+Stamina vs Difficulty 3 per book).

followerGroup.name: Group (follower)
followerGroup.description: Five to ten people; mixed action to issue two orders at once.

followerMob.name: Mob (follower)
followerMob.description: Twenty to fifty people; Scale one higher than the Hero on numbers; mixed action for two orders.

followerSavage.name: Savage (follower)
followerSavage.description: +2 Enhancement on actions meant to harm (physical or emotional).

followerAccess.name: Access (follower)
followerAccess.description: Opens one Terra Incognita, Overworld, Underworld, or a broad class of mortal institution (repeatable).

followerSmooth.name: Smooth (follower)
followerSmooth.description: Improves Storyguide character Attitude by 1 when present and receptive.

brutal.name: Brutal
brutal.description: Critical Stunt needs one fewer success.

weaponAttach.name: Attach (weapon)
weaponAttach.description: Mounts on another item or weapon to function as a different weapon (e.g. bayonet).
weaponAttach.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Attach).

burns.name: Burns
burns.description: Inflicts burn-style Injuries (e.g. scorched flesh) instead of ordinary cuts or bruises.
burns.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Burns).

defensiveWeapon.name: Defensive (weapon)
defensiveWeapon.description: If not used to attack this round, grants Enhancement 1 to defensive rolls instead of the attack; defensive use prevents attacking that round.
defensiveWeapon.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Defensive).

doubleWeapon.name: Double (weapon)
doubleWeapon.description: Two usable sides: wielder picks Bashing or Lethal for the round, not both in the same round.
doubleWeapon.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Double).

fragileWeapon.name: Fragile (weapon)
fragileWeapon.pointCostNote: Divine Armory: weaker version is a level-1 Complication to overcome on attack or the weapon breaks; stronger version breaks automatically after a hit.
fragileWeapon.description: Risk of breaking on use; severity depends on tier purchased on the table.
fragileWeapon.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Fragile).

inaccurate.name: Inaccurate
inaccurate.description: Poorly suited as a weapon: +1 Difficulty to attack rolls with it (common on improvised gear).
inaccurate.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Inaccurate).

prototypeWeapon.name: Prototype (weapon)
prototypeWeapon.pointCostNote: Divine Armory: Complication level equals tag magnitude; failing yields a Glitched-style malfunction — see PDF.
prototypeWeapon.description: Experimental build: powerful or novel but prone to jams or glitches.
prototypeWeapon.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Prototype).

resetWeapon.name: Reset (weapon)
resetWeapon.description: Single use before reload or reset; may spend an action or beat a level-1 Complication before firing again (book options).
resetWeapon.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Reset).

shortRange.name: Short range (firearm)
shortRange.description: Firearm effective only out to short range instead of usual bands.
shortRange.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Short Range).

weaponSoftMinor.name: Soft — minor (weapon)
weaponSoftMinor.description: Raises Difficulty to inflict an Injury Condition by 1 (Divine Armory weapon Soft, mild tier). Not armor Soft.
weaponSoftMinor.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Soft, weapon).

weaponSoftMajor.name: Soft — major (weapon)
weaponSoftMajor.description: Cannot cause Injury Conditions at all (Divine Armory weapon Soft, strong tier).
weaponSoftMajor.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Soft, weapon).

weaponTool.name: Tool (weapon)
weaponTool.description: Doubles as a plausible tool; Enhancement 1 on fitting non-combat rolls when used as that tool.
weaponTool.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, introduction (Tool).

slotHelm.name: Slot: helm
slotHelm.description: Armor build counts a helmet slot or integrated head protection as part of its tag budget (Divine Armory armor write-ups).
slotHelm.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, armor chapter / appendix (Slot Helm).

camouflageArmor.name: Camouflage (armor)
camouflageArmor.description: Helps the wearer blend into terrain or hunting fiction; confirm bonuses with the Storyguide.
camouflageArmor.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf, armor chapter (Camouflage).
